## Checklist

- Commits follow `type: description` format (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages))
- Tested locally in a browser (open `index.html` via a local server or GitHub Pages preview)
- No hardcoded personal data introduced — everything configurable goes in `config.js`
- Template changes, if any, do not break the zero-config usage path
